title: tragacantha decurrens
intro: Tragacantha decurrens, also known as the goat's thorn or the thorny saltwort, is a type of plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Tragacantha decurrens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
